description: Style NoteA shoe with urban flair and casual style, this nike Braata shoe is a good looking pair. Your shoe closet absolutely needs this casual essential. Perfect for college wear or coffee dates, you can style this with a tonal monochrome tee. Product DetailsBlunt toed canvas shoe in purple with no overlays and central lace-upsNike swoosh at the backfootPU midsole with foxingExaggerated herringbone grooves in the TPU outsole Material and CareCanvasWipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in sunlight
